details: The agent ran thorough commands (triage, pods, deploy, logs, pod view, deployment yaml, job yaml, events) and correctly concluded nothing is broken. It accurately identified both benign signals: the web pod's single restart was by design (the startup script intentionally exits 1 on first run to simulate a cache cold blip), and the db-migrate job completed successfully in 4 seconds. The agent answered confidently with no hedging, explained the root cause of each 'weird' signal, and confirmed with zero warning events.
